message:
Implement bulkhead combinator with queue timeout fix

Adds bulkhead combinator for resource isolation:
- BulkheadPolicy configuration (max_concurrent, max_queue, queue_timeout)
- Weighted permit acquisition (try_acquire, call, call_weighted)
- Queue management with timeout detection
- BulkheadMetrics for observability
- BulkheadRegistry for managing multiple named bulkheads
- Comprehensive unit tests (27 tests)

Fixed queue timeout bug: entries now track rejection reason explicitly
(Timeout vs Cancelled) to ensure check_entry returns the correct error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
